description_long: This is a simple, rounded cup with a smooth, matte surface and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The cup has a wide, circular opening that tapers gently down to a narrower base, giving it a classic, ergonomic shape. The handle is thick and curved, providing a comfortable grip for holding hot or cold beverages. The exterior and interior surfaces appear uniformly colored, with no visible branding, patterns, or decorative elements. The cup is likely made from ceramic or porcelain, materials commonly used for kitchenware due to their durability and heat resistance. Its size and proportions suggest it is suitable for serving coffee, tea, or other drinks in an urban kitchen, café, or outdoor setting.
description: A smooth, rounded ceramic cup with a single thick handle and a wide opening, finished in a uniform matte color. The design is simple and functional, with no visible decorations or branding.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from a front angle, clearly showing the wide opening and the full handle on the right side.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed directly from the handle side, with the handle centered and the body of the cup symmetrically behind it.
description_view_2: The cup is shown from the opposite side, with the handle on the left and the body of the cup fully visible.
description_view_3: The cup is viewed from the back, with the handle not visible and the smooth, rounded body of the cup prominent.
